|desc={{p|Xatu}} is Will's first known Pokémon. It was first used to attack Green at the Ilex Forest. Green's fear of birds prevented her from fighting back. Later, it was used against {{adv|Silver}} while on Lugia's back. After being weakened by a {{m|Beat Up}} from Silver's entire team, Xatu was defeated by a {{m|Return}} from [[Silver's Feraligatr]]. In ''[[PS268|The Escape]]'', it was revealed to have evolved from a {{p|Natu}}.

Xatu's only known move is {{m|Psychic}}.}}
